compiled_state.title: dso:onboarding: non-Python project -> pyproject.toml listed as scanned artifact
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
The /dso:onboarding skill reports scanning pyproject.toml as part of project analysis even when the project is not Python-based. This produces misleading output and suggests the onboarding skill lacks stack-aware filtering of artifact types.
